hero.title: Rent Farm Equipment
hero.subtitle: Easily & Affordably
hero.description: Connect with verified equipment owners near you. Book tractors, harvesters, sprayers and more at the best prices.

features.affordableDesc: Rent premium farming equipment at budget-friendly rates. No hidden charges, transparent pricing for every farmer.
features.wideVarietyDesc: Choose from tractors, plows, harvesters, sprayers, and 10+ categories of modern farming equipment.
features.fastBookingDesc: Easy and quick rental process with instant confirmation. Book in minutes, not hours.
features.deliveryDesc: Equipment delivered right to your farm. Available in select locations across the region.
features.supportDesc: Our team is available round the clock to help you with any queries or equipment issues.
features.verifiedDesc: All equipment owners are verified and trusted. Rent with complete confidence and safety.

steps.browseDesc: Search and filter from hundreds of farming equipment listings near you.
steps.bookDesc: Select your equipment, choose rental dates, and confirm your booking instantly.
steps.payDesc: Make secure payments online. Multiple payment options available.
steps.farmDesc: Receive equipment and start your work. Return when done. Simple!

sections.findByCategoryDesc: Browse through our wide collection of farming equipment
sections.whyDesc: We make farming equipment rental simple, safe and affordable
sections.howItWorksDesc: Get your equipment in 4 simple steps

errors.fetchEquipment: Failed to load equipment. Please try again.

messages.tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting your filters or check back later for new listings.

subtitles.findEquipment: Find the perfect farming equipment for your needs

cta.title: 🚜 Have Equipment to Rent Out?
cta.description: List your farming equipment and start earning money today! Join thousands of equipment owners.
